861 ROUTE_RSDNT_VRBL_CD ROUTE_RSDNT_VRBL_CD A2124C Patient Trans - Verbal CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the route(s) of transmission of the current reconciled medication list to the resident/family/caregiver was verbal (e.g., in-person, telephone, video conferencing). 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
